inputs.text: Award-winning interior design photography: a fully finished bedroom with bed and sleeping area, designed in min natural minimalism style — tasteful contemporary interior design: comfortable mid-tone furniture in beige and taupe, soft natural textiles like linen and cotton, oak hardwood floors, neutral cream walls with subtle wainscoting, warm pendant lighting, indoor plants, balanced symmetric layout, family-friendly inviting atmosphere. Completely transform this raw space: apply authentic wall finishes (paint, wallpaper, panels, plaster — appropriate to style), period-correct flooring (hardwood, tile, carpet, concrete — style-driven choice), proper ceiling treatment (smooth, beamed, coffered, exposed — depending on style), layered lighting (ambient, task, accent — style-driven fixtures), and furnish with king or queen size bed with upholstered headboard, premium bedding and layered pillows, floor lamp, table lamps, wall sconces, ambient lighting, cushions, candles, vases, decorative objects, lush indoor plants in decorative pots and planters. светлые тона, натуральное дерево, спокойствие, минимум предметов Visual aesthetic: high-end interior design magazine cover quality, AD Architectural Digest style, Elle Decor photography. Composition: balanced rule of thirds, professional staging, curated decor. Lighting: natural daylight from existing windows blended with ambient warm interior lighting, soft shadows, golden hour quality. Camera: wide-angle 24mm lens, eye-level perspective, sharp focus throughout, slight HDR. Quality: 8K ultra-detailed, photorealistic, hyperrealistic textures, natural materials with realistic micro-details, perfect lighting harmony, no AI artifacts. CRITICAL ARCHITECTURAL CONSTRAINT: Keep the EXACT same room shape, EXACT same proportions, EXACT same window positions and sizes, EXACT same door openings, EXACT same ceiling height, EXACT same camera perspective and angle as the source photo — modify ONLY interior design, surface materials, decorative finishes, and furniture placement.

modern style (when not requested), generic IKEA look, white minimalism (when not requested), changed room shape, moved windows, moved doors, different room size, different perspective, different camera angle, fisheye, distorted geometry, extra rooms added, walls removed, walls added, new openings, missing windows, cartoon, anime, illustration, painting, drawing, sketch, 3d render look, video game, low quality, blurry, soft focus, motion blur, lens flare, chromatic aberration, oversaturated colors, overprocessed HDR, watermark, signature, text, logo, deformed furniture, melting objects, floating objects, impossible geometry, duplicate windows, asymmetric mirroring, plastic-looking surfaces, fake-looking materials
